title: Analytics - Device Connected
scenario: Analytics event "device_connected" is logged upon successful device connection via the Poly Studio Mobile app, with event counts updating in Firebase dashboard after a few hours
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on a device to initiate connection.
Wait for the device to connect successfully.
Observe the Firebase Analytics dashboard for the "device_connected" event.
expected: The "device_connected" analytics event is logged in Firebase with correct event counts, device PID, device serial, app version, app build, app environment, and default analytics dimensions (country, gender, events per session). Event counts update after a few hours.
